title: JV-11 - Local MT provider implementation with timeout, cancel, lazy load, and metrics

labels.name: priority:P0
labels.description: Must-have for the first usable product increment

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

body:
## Summary

Implement the chosen local MT runtime so it can serve ja->vi subtitles within realtime budgets.

## Why is this needed?

The provider must be safe under Tokio, not block UI/audio, expose metrics, and fail visibly instead of silently using cloud.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- Runtime decision from JV-10.
- Model manifest from JV-09.
- MtProvider trait and RuntimeMtProvider construction.
- runtime_caps and inference_priority modules.

## Outputs

- Local MT engine loading and translate path for chosen candidate.
- Lazy load state, timeout, cooperative cancel, CPU/RAM caps, tracing spans, latency metrics.
- Actionable errors for missing model, timeout, unsupported language, and runtime DLL missing.

## Implementation approach

- Use tokio spawn_blocking for CPU inference and keep UI/audio threads free.
- Use OnceCell or equivalent for lazy engine reuse.
- Set per-call deadline around 1.2s unless benchmark evidence justifies another value.
- Record encode/decode latency, token counts, RSS/CPU, and active local inference gauge without logging text.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] translate returns non-empty vi for valid ja input with installed model.
- [ ] Timeout/cancel returns ServiceUnavailable and does not hang the pipeline.
- [ ] No production log includes source text, translated text, or API key.
- [ ] Provider respects source=ja target=vi and rejects unsupported pairs.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Unit tests for language validation, NFKC/tokenization, timeout, cancel, empty input, missing model.
- [ ] Integration smoke with installed test model or fixture.
- [ ] cargo fmt, clippy, cargo test pass.
- [ ] Review verdict CLEAN.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-08, JV-09, JV-10.
- Blocks JV-12, JV-13, JV-16.

## Agent routing

Build: Rust provider specialist on claude-sonnet-4.6+. Review: tui-rust-code-reviewer, crash-root-cause if native crash risk appears.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-11
- Wave: P2 provider
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: feature, area: providers, area: pipeline, area: performance, provider: local, priority:P0, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

Extends existing local/mt.rs stub/partial implementation into production runtime.
